title: fragariastrum nivalis
intro: Fragariastrum nivalis, also known as Snowberry Clearweed, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to North America, characterized by its white or pale yellow flowers and reddish-purple berries. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Fragariastrum nivalis include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, and are often used to treat various ailments, from wounds and skin conditions to respiratory issues and digestive problems.
